events.title: Show Nights
events.strapline: Live show productions mapped to real DesignMyNight booking type IDs.
events.shortDescription: The signature immersive show night with a welcome drink, stage-side table and optional dining.
events.description: Show Nights now act as the branded front-end layer for live DMN booking types such as Dine & Dance, Coyote Wild, Ministry of Clubland and themed musical nights.

events.title: Bottomless Drunch
events.strapline: Theme-controlled Drunch dates mapped to the live DMN Drunch booking type.
events.shortDescription: High-energy daytime booking with bottomless drinks, food and a full show-bar atmosphere.
events.description: Drunch themes are generated from the website-side event manager layer, then connected to the real DesignMyNight Drunch booking type for availability and payment handoff.

events.title: Christmas Peacock
events.strapline: Festive show dates connected to real seasonal DMN booking types.
events.shortDescription: Seasonal show dates with festive production, group-led booking logic and enquiry fallback.
events.description: Christmas Peacock keeps the calendar logic flexible: fixed seasonal dates, group availability and enquiry-led options when tables are close to capacity.
